primaryUse: Pop-art framing, fame loops, taste, repetition, surface, and cultural distribution.

reusePolicy.summary: Use public archive and museum sources as context anchors only.
reusePolicy.transcripts: Archive interviews and media are reference-only; do not vendor full texts or images.
